basic_info.name: Wen Liu
basic_info.title: Senior Associate Professor
basic_info.department: Department of EEE, School of Advanced Technology
positions: Executive Director, XJTLU Advanced Semiconductor Research Center
Chair, IEEE CASS-EDS Joint Chapter Suzhou
Deputy Director, Youth Innovation Promotion Committee, CASA China
Director, XJTLU-Hong & Blue Microelectronics GaN Power Device Joint Research Center

research_areas: GaN power devices and their circuit integration
Physics-driven and AI-enhanced design of GaN-based devices and ICs
High performance GaN power devices and IC
All GaN DC-DC converter for radiation resistance

research_projects.title: Development and Industrialization of High Performance Gallium Nitride Power Integrated Intelligent Chips
research_projects.funding_source: National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC) General Programme

research_projects.title: 1200V high-voltage nitride power electronic materials and devices for industrial motors and wireless charging applications, and their industrialization
research_projects.funding_source: National Key R&D Programme, Ministry of Science and Technology

research_projects.title: Research on single-stage high frequency link power sub transformer based on gallium nitride power integration

publications.journal_papers: 50+ (IEEE EDL, TED, TPE, Applied Surface Science, etc.)

courses.name: Advanced Semiconductor Materials and Devices for Efficient Power Conversion
Power Electronics and Application of Renewable Energy

conference_roles: Publication Chair, IEEE International Conference on IC Design and Manufacturing (2023)
Program Committee, Power Semiconductor Devices and ICs Workshop (2024, 2025)
committee_memberships: Organizing Committee, 5th National Wide Bandgap Semiconductor Conference (2023, 2025)

awards: Dushu Lake Science and Education Innovation Zone Visiting Engineering Award (2022)

why_choose_for_sop.research_alignment: 研究方向与申请人背景/兴趣的匹配点
why_choose_for_sop.funding_strength: 充足的国家级经费保障研究条件
why_choose_for_sop.supervision_quality: 丰富的博士生培养经验（9名已毕业）和官方认可（2023督导奖）
why_choose_for_sop.international_environment: 西交利物浦大学的国际化平台（英国高等教育认证）
why_choose_for_sop.industry_connection: 华为横向课题等产学研合作，成果转化路径清晰
why_choose_for_sop.team_collaboration: 明确的课题组成员分工，跨学科合作
